description: Schema/template for symbolic SageMath constraints of the Grigorian G2 -> SU(3) octonionic slice.

variables.S: Q^2, used for rational symbolic elimination over QQ

symbolic_constraints.resultant_Q: <eliminate mu: polynomial lifted to Q via S=Q^2>

notes: This file is a static schema/template only.
It intentionally contains no computed SageMath resultants.
Computed output should be generated with: sage -python examples/run_sage_bridge.py --json --out docs/energiedoku_exports/sage_symbolic_constraints.json
The S=Q^2 convention avoids adjoining sqrt(15) over QQ during symbolic elimination.
